name: Instant Mashed Potatoes

pros.title: practical whole-food carb base
pros.explanation: Tubers earn real credit as usable staples.

pros.title: can be fairly filling when kept simple
pros.explanation: Preparation matters, but the category has useful upside.

pros.title: works across lots of cooking styles
pros.explanation: Utility matters in a staple-carb category.

cons.title: instant format weakens the steadier whole-tuber case
cons.explanation: Convenient, but clearly not one of the better category anchors.

cons.title: still a carb-heavy category
cons.explanation: That is the core ceiling tubers have to manage.

cons.title: preparation changes outcomes a lot
cons.explanation: What you do to a tuber can make or break it.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
